name: Beer Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add onions and carrots, stirring occasionally until softened.
3. Stir in flour, cooking on low heat for 3-4 minutes until golden brown.
4. Gradually stir in paprika, mustard, beer, and chicken broth.
5. Whisk until smooth.
6. Stir in cheese, bringing to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 5-10 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and stir in heavy cream.
9. Add Tabasco and serve with popcorn.
Serves 6.
